summary: Full backend + frontend verification of Legal Settings, Footer Extras, Cookie Banner and Admin Legal & Social panel on the CRA web bundle at /api/web-ui/. All 17 pytest tests passed (public endpoints, cookie consent validation, admin RBAC 401/403/200, PUT validation for unknown social/legal kinds, persistence to public endpoints, consent stats). Frontend: cookie banner appears on first visit with all 3 buttons and 4 categories; Accept-all closes banner and writes cookie_consent_v1 to localStorage; footer-extras / footer-socials / 3 footer-legal-* buttons render; clicking footer-legal-terms opens legal-modal-terms with the admin-edited title/body; admin panel /admin/legal-settings renders with admin-legal-settings, nav-legal-settings (sidebar Scale icon as added this session), legal-save, all 6 social toggles+URL inputs (legal-social-{telegram,tiktok,instagram,youtube,facebook,github}-{toggle,url}), 3 doc tabs (legal-doc-tab-{terms,privacy,cookies}), title/body fields and 3 stat cards (legal-stat-{all,essential,rejected}). UI save flow: edit telegram URL → click legal-save → 'Saved' toast appears → value persists via GET /api/public/legal-settings. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: /app/backend/server.py is ~28k lines and well over the 700-line guideline — pre-existing, not part of this feature; legal_settings.py is a properly modularised router file (~257 lines).

Admin login page at /api/web-ui/admin/auth did not render an email/password form on a fresh navigation in Playwright (landing page rendered instead). Login via POST /api/auth/login (cookie-based session) works perfectly and the admin SPA route /admin/legal-settings then loads. Not blocking this feature but worth verifying that the dedicated /admin/auth screen renders for users who bookmark it directly.
seed_data_creation: Tests left the singleton legal_settings document with TEST_-prefixed Terms title/body and a test telegram URL. Backend is idempotent (PUT merges); no cleanup required by spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth in this app is cookie-based (session_token cookie set by POST /api/auth/login), NOT bearer-token. For Playwright, log in by issuing a fetch from inside page.evaluate before navigating to admin routes. Web bundle served at /api/web-ui/ — direct navigation to /api/web-ui/admin/<anything> works once the session cookie is set. testIDs used by the Legal & social admin: admin-legal-settings, legal-save, legal-social-<key>-{toggle,url} for keys telegram|tiktok|instagram|youtube|facebook|github, legal-doc-tab-{terms,privacy,cookies}, legal-doc-{kind}-{title,body}, legal-stat-{all,essential,rejected}, nav-legal-settings (sidebar). Cookie banner testIDs: cookie-banner, cookie-banner-{customize,essential,accept-all}, cookie-banner-cat-{essential,functional,analytics,marketing}. Footer: footer-extras, footer-socials, footer-legal-links, footer-legal-{terms,privacy,cookies}, legal-modal-{terms,privacy,cookies}.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in the Legal Settings / Footer / Cookie Banner / Admin Legal & Social feature set.
